title: Stickman Adventure
description:
Welcome to the ultimate 2D platforming challenge!

This is a pure, reflex-driven 2D platformer that focuses entirely on skill and precision. No distractions—just a classic stickman, meticulously designed geometric levels, and the ultimate test of your gaming mechanics.

🎮 GameplayTake control of a stickman as you run and leap through a world filled with unknown dangers. Your objective is simple: learn the layout of the levels through trial and error, dodge every lethal trap along the way, and safely reach the checkpoint!

🌟 Key Features• Hardcore Level Design: Every ledge and every gap has been fine-tuned. To survive, you must master the exact timing and distance of your jumps.

• Lethal Trap Matrices: Spikes, chasms, and sudden obstacles await. The terrain itself is your greatest enemy—one wrong move, and it's instant restart!

• Minimalist Visual Style: Clean stickman animations and crisp lines allow you to stay 100% focused on your inputs and strategies.

• Die, Retry, and Triumph: Build muscle memory through failure. The unparalleled sense of accomplishment when you finally hit that safe checkpoint makes every attempt worth it.
description_short: A 2D stickman platformer where players control a stickman to dodge traps and obstacles along the way to reach the checkpoint.
